meta.philosophy: Wholesale universe first; promote only in-play symbols to high-frequency live attention.

ingestion_stages.purpose: Cheap broad context, factor drift, sector ranking, weekly regime memory.
Score the whole universe before market open and build the candidate slate.
Moderate-frequency scan for the current day's candidate slate.
Only the promoted in-play names get websocket/trade/quote intensity.
Smallest set: active orders, held positions, hedges, and immediate trade candidates.

watchlists.name: Futures External Equity Index
watchlists.notes: Use active contract resolver for live futures; yfinance symbols are research/backfill only.

watchlists.name: Futures External Rates
watchlists.notes: Treasury futures are key macro-awareness inputs for duration/rate shocks.

watchlists.name: Futures External Yield
watchlists.notes: Yield futures require provider-specific symbol support.

watchlists.name: Futures External Energy
watchlists.notes: CL/MCL crude, BZ Brent, NG gas, RB gasoline, HO heating oil.

watchlists.name: Futures External Agriculture
watchlists.notes: Research-only unless you add a futures feed; note ZS is soybeans here, not Zscaler equity.

watchlists.name: Futures External Fx
watchlists.notes: FX futures/DXY awareness for dollar liquidity and multinational/commodity impacts.

watchlists.name: Futures External Crypto
watchlists.notes: Use external futures provider if you specifically need CME crypto futures; otherwise Alpaca crypto pairs are simpler.

notes: This file is schema-ready; official names are intentionally null until hydrated by enrich_yfinance_names.py.
Use name.display for UI labels; it falls back to display_symbol until yfinance returns longName or shortName.
Namespaced IDs prevent collisions such as equity:ZS versus futures_external:ZS.
